meaning: vt.<美>详细说明...项目,逐条列记
examples: The report will itemize the cost of various improvements.
Can take a group a couple of evenings to itemize, condense and prioritize.
Before we itemize the differences between JAX-RPC 1.1 and JAX-WS 2.0, we should first discuss what is the same.
Borrowers can deduct the interest payment from their federal taxes if they itemize their deductions.
Itemize the different criteria by which executives are rewarded for hitting various performance targets.
